items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Learning Action Priors for Cross-embodiment Robot Manipulation
items.title_cn: 跨体机器人操纵的学习动作先验
items.summary: Most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models build on a Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone by attaching an action module and optimizing the full policy jointly. This design inherits strong visual and linguistic priors from the VLM, but leaves the action module to learn physical motion almost from scra...
items.summary_cn: 大多数视觉-语言-行动（ VLA ）模型通过附加一个行动模块并共同优化整个策略，建立在视觉-语言模型（ VLM ）主干之上。此设计从VLM继承了强大的视觉和语言先验，但留下了动作模块，几乎可以从SCRA学习身体运动...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: On-Policy Self-Distillation with Sampled Demonstrations Reduces Output Diversity
items.title_cn: 采用抽样演示的政策自我蒸馏减少了输出多样性
items.summary: On-policy self-distillation achieves strong pass@1 accuracy by using a single model as both teacher and student, with the teacher conditioned on a correct demonstration to provide dense token-level feedback. We show that this could come at a hidden cost: rollout diversity decreases and pass@k curves...
items.summary_cn: 策略自馏通过使用单一模型作为教师和学生来实现强PASS @ 1准确性，教师以正确的演示为条件提供密集的令牌级反馈。我们表明，这可能需要付出隐性代价：推出多样性降低并通过@ k曲线...
items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents
items.title_cn: 被忽视的培训后免费午餐： LLM代理的进度优势
items.summary: Process reward models enable fine-grained, step-level evaluation of LLMs, yet building them for agentic settings remains prohibitively difficult: long-horizon interactions, irreversible actions, and stochastic environment feedback make both human annotation and Monte Carlo estimation infeasible at s...
items.summary_cn: 过程奖励模型能够对LLM进行细粒度、阶梯级的评估，但为代理设置构建它们仍然非常困难：长距离交互、不可逆操作和随机环境反馈使得人工注释和蒙特卡洛估计在...
items.comment: Meta/Llama系又放大招，社区狂欢，不过实际部署成本您考虑过吗？

items.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Anthropic's Latest Model

items.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet with improved reasoning and coding capabilities.
items.summary_cn: Anthropic发布了具有改进的推理和编码功能的Claude 3.5 Sonnet。
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
